videos.headline: Lawrance Toafili breaks free for a 28-yard FSU TD
videos.description: Lawrance Toafili dusts the Georgia Tech defense for Florida State's opening touchdown of the season from the 28-yard line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Lawrance Toafili breaks free for a 28-yard FSU TD) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Malik Rutherford's 42-yard gain sets up a Georgia Tech TD
videos.description: Malik Rutherford rumbles up the field for a 42-yard pickup to set Zach Pyron up for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Malik Rutherford's 42-yard gain sets up a Georgia Tech TD) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia Tech comes up with a big 4th down stop
videos.description: Ahmari Harvey stops the Seminoles offense short of the sticks to force a turnover on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Georgia Tech comes up with a big 4th down stop) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamal Haynes fights his way into the end zone
videos.description: Jamal Haynes gets an assist from the Yellow Jackets' offensive line to fight into the end zone for a TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jamal Haynes fights his way into the end zone) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Fitzgerald drills a 59-yard FG to pull FSU even
videos.description: Ryan Fitzgerald hits the second-longest field goal in FSU history to tie the game going into halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Ryan Fitzgerald drills a 59-yard FG to pull FSU even) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU's Edwin Joseph lays the boom on special teams
videos.description: Edwin Joseph flies in for a thunderous hit on Rodney Shelley for FSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (FSU's Edwin Joseph lays the boom on special teams) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamal Haynes leaps into the end zone to give GT the lead
videos.description: Jamal Haynes finds the end zone again to give Georgia Tech the lead in the 4th quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jamal Haynes leaps into the end zone to give GT the lead) 2024/8/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU marches down the field to tie it in the 4th quarter
videos.description: Florida State moves the ball down the field before Roydell Williams punches it in to tie the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (FSU marches down the field to tie it in the 4th quarter) 2024/8/24 ESHEET
